summary: Comprehensive testing of FacturePro Payment Tracking Dashboard with Overdue Invoice Reminders - All features working. Backend 12/12 tests passed, Frontend UI fully functional.
seed_data_creation: 1 overdue test invoice exists (INV-0001, due 2025-12-01, 122 days overdue, client: Service Incendie de Sutton, total: 862.31$)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment tracking dashboard with overdue invoice reminders fully tested. New endpoints: GET /api/dashboard/overdue (returns overdue invoices with days_overdue, client info, last_reminded), POST /api/invoices/{id}/remind (sends reminder email with PDF attachment via Resend). Dashboard shows 'Suivi des paiements' section with overdue table, total badge, and 'Rappel' buttons. Resend free tier can only send to owner email (guillaume.dubeau@facturepro.ca).

dashboard_overdue_tracker.overdue_count_message: PASS - Shows '1 facture(s) en retard — 862,31 $ impayé'

overdue_table.headers: PASS - Facture, Client, Montant, Retard, Dernier rappel, Action

send_reminder.error_handling: PASS - Shows error message for Resend free tier limitation
send_reminder.message_styling: PASS - Error message has red background

regression_tests.quotes_page: PASS - Filter, sort, create form all working
regression_tests.invoices_page: PASS - Filter, sort, create form, PDF/Email buttons all working
regression_tests.invoice_status_badge: PASS - Shows 'En retard' status for overdue invoice

new_endpoints: GET /api/dashboard/overdue - Returns overdue invoices list with count, total_overdue, days_overdue, client info
POST /api/invoices/{id}/remind - Sends reminder email with PDF attachment via Resend
verified_behavior: Overdue endpoint auto-updates invoice status to 'overdue' when due_date < today
Remind endpoint updates last_reminded field on success
Overdue invoices sorted by days_overdue descending
Total overdue equals sum of all overdue invoice totals

mocked_apis: None - All APIs are real (Resend email with PDF attachment, MongoDB)
notes: Resend free tier sender (onboarding@resend.dev) can only deliver to account owner's email (guillaume.dubeau@facturepro.ca). Reminder to other recipients will fail with 500 error but error is properly displayed in UI.
